infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to describe scenes for visually impaired users
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Used for voice commands to control the app
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Used to include your location in emergency SOS messages when a fall is detected

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow VisionVoice to access your camera to describe scenes.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow VisionVoice to use your microphone for voice commands.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow VisionVoice to use your location for emergency SOS messages.
